summary: Completed comprehensive testing of INFO FORTRESS Misinformation Prevention Platform. All 3 layers, dashboard, and AI analysis functionality working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI fully responsive with proper navigation and interactions.
passed_tests: Dashboard NRI gauge with 0-100 scoring and color-coded risk levels
Velocity chart displaying 24h claim tracking data with Recharts
Layer 1 official documents table with risk scores and fabrication indicators
Layer 2 claims, clusters, and trending tabs with filtering functionality
Layer 3 systemic patterns, threat distribution charts, and resilience score
Analyze page AI document and claim analysis functionality
Navigation between all pages via React Router
All API endpoints returning correct data structures
AI analysis endpoints working with Emergent LLM integration
Backend API tests: 27/27 passed (100% success rate)
Mock data generation across all three layers
Interactive elements with proper data-testid attributes
Dark tactical theme with Barlow Condensed and Inter fonts
Tab navigation in Layer 2 and Analyze pages
Filter buttons in Layer 2 claims section
AI analysis loading states and form validation
